title: APC NetBotz Environmental SNMP Humidity Condensation Risk
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:envmon"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="snmp:apc:envmon" earliest=-24h
| eval rh=tonumber(coalesce(humiditySensorRelativeHumidity, rh_pct, ""))
| eval dew_gap=tonumber(coalesce(dewpoint_margin_c, ""))
| where rh>65 OR (isnotnull(dew_gap) AND dew_gap<3)
| stats latest(rh) as rh_pct by sensor_name location
description: High RH with chilled supply air drives condensation on ducts and gear surfaces.
value: Prevents corrosion and shorting in edge sites without full BMS.
implementation: (1) Pair with supply temp if available. (2) Alert facilities before setpoint changes.
visualization: Gauge RH; scatter RH vs temp.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Leak alerts from condensation, scheduled maintenance moisture, or false-trigger sensors.
